name: web-app/react-vite
description: React + Vite + TypeScript single-page app (Tailwind, react-router). SaaS front-end surface (ADR-0011).
_note: Catalog + families live in architecture/catalog.json (the fixed 7, ADR-0005/0009). Front-end profile: MiniMax M3 (multimodal / frontend-from-design) is the PRIMARY implementer; Qwen3.7-Plus is the secondary — operator-researched pairing (2026-07-15): Plus is strong on UI work and multimodal inputs (images/designs/PDFs), so both front-end implementers can be fed designs. GLM-5.2 stays the back-end workhorse (ts-hono-api). Roles v2 (ADR-0022): specs name a role (owner_role), NEVER a model — resolve_roles maps it here; the only spec-level pin is model_override/verifier_override + override_reason (gate risk-flags it). P8 is structural: verifier_secondary covers an author that shares the verifier's family.
